question:
Consider the following statements :
I. According to Continental Drift Theory, about 150 million years ago, Pangaea, the super continent, had split into Laurasia and Gondwanaland.
II. About 65 million years ago, Gondwanaland further broke up to give rise to other continents.
Which of the above statements is/are correct ?

options.1: At the focus of an earthquake, the energy is released.
options.2: The point on the surface nearest to the focus is called epicentre.
options.3: Epicentre is the first one to experience the waves.
options.4: Epicentre is a point directly below the focus.
